# Fine Skills Academy

> Korporativ jamoalar uchun zamonaviy kasbiy ta'lim. Banklar, kompaniyalar va institutlar uchun amaliy treninglar (Toshkent, O'zbekiston).

Fine Skills Academy delivers corporate training programs for banks, companies, and institutions in Uzbekistan. Focus areas include finance, IFRS, risk management, data analytics, AI tools, marketing, PR, and soft skills.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Fine Skills Academy — directions, audience, team, certificates, and contact.

## Sections

- [About](/#about): How trainings are organized (5-step process).
- [Services](/#services): Training directions (Finance, IFRS, Risk, Data Analytics, AI, Marketing/PR, Soft Skills, ACCA/CFA/FRM).
- [Team](/#team): Trainers and their specializations.
- [Certificates](/#certificates): Issued certificates and recognitions.
- [Contact](/#contact): Contact form, email info@fineskills.uz, phone +998 94 696 26 99.
